meta.name: Meeting-to-Action Converter
meta.description: Receive a meeting transcript, extract decisions, action items (owner + deadline), blockers, and follow-up questions, then distribute tasks to owners.

parameters.content:
## 16 — Meeting-to-Action Converter

Paste a meeting transcript into the webhook and get back:
- Decisions made
- Action items with owners + deadlines
- Blockers and dependencies
- Follow-up questions

**Required:** OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO
**Optional:** Connect to Linear or Jira to auto-create tickets from action items.

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { meeting_id: body.id || `meet_${Date.now()}`, title: body.title || body.meeting_name || 'Untitled Meeting', date: body.date || new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), attendees: body.attendees || [], transcript: (body.transcript || body.text || body.notes || '').slice(0,12000), meeting_type: body.meeting_type || 'general' } }];

values.content: Extract meeting actions from transcripts. Only extract what is explicitly stated. If a deadline or owner is not mentioned, use null. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: ✅ Meeting Actions: {{ $json.title }} ({{ $json.date }})
